Describe the visible model numbers on the engine stickers as they appear throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a black engine shows label '2203'; at 2s, a sticker reads '222' next to a box; at 4s, the number '2000' appears on a sticker; at 8s, '2200' is visible on the valve cover; at 18s, label '2205' is adhered to the side.
